title: Resolution ordering election
doc_html:
§1848.  Resolution ordering election

The election shall be ordered by resolution which shall state the amount of bonded debt and other indebtedness to be assumed, and shall designate the districts whose debts are to be assumed.
doc_text:
§1848.  Resolution ordering election
The election shall be ordered by resolution which shall state the amount of bonded debt and other indebtedness to be assumed, and shall designate the districts whose debts are to be assumed.
